After Peter, James, and John had ordained them to the office of Apostles, why were they commanded to re- ordain each other as Elders, by the voice and sanction of the Church ? It was to set a perfect pattern for the Church, that future ordinations might not be conferred without her sanction, where there was a regularly organized Branch.
